flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Villanova University rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($33.6k → $38.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Villanova University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($59.0k → $67.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Villanova University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Villanova University are 70% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($100.4k vs $59.0k).
